title: AIS Agentic Engineering Framework — Gap Report
description: JSON Schema 2020-12 for a gap report document produced after a brownfield readiness assessment. Organises gaps by severity and provides a phased remediation plan.

$schema.description: JSON Schema URI for this document.

generated_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this gap report was generated.

assessment_ref.description: Relative path to the source readiness-assessment.yaml this gap report was derived from.

summary.description: 2–3 sentence executive summary of the overall gap picture and recommended course of action.

critical_gaps.description: Gaps with severity=critical. These block safe framework adoption and must be addressed first.

high_gaps.description: Gaps with severity=high. Significant impediment to effective agentic workflows.

medium_gaps.description: Gaps with severity=medium. Important but not blocking initial adoption.

low_gaps.description: Gaps with severity=low. Nice-to-have improvements for a mature implementation.

work_management_recommendation.description: Recommended work management provider with configuration guidance.

config_path.description: Relative path where the generated work_management config block will be written.

mcp_recommendations.description: MCP server integration recommendations derived from identified gaps.

rationale.description: Why this MCP tool would address identified gaps.

estimated_initialization_hours.description: Total estimated person-hours to complete all remediation steps across all severity levels.

phase_plan.description: Phased remediation plan. Each phase groups related gaps into a coherent delivery increment.

phase.description: Phase number (1 = first phase to execute).

description.description: One-sentence description of this phase's focus.

deliverables.description: Concrete files, configs, or artifacts this phase produces.

detailed_gap.description: A detailed gap entry with remediation steps and effort estimate.

area.description: Assessment dimension or functional area of the gap.

description.description: Clear statement of what is missing or insufficient.

impact.description: What breaks or is risky if this gap is not closed.

remediation_steps.description: Ordered list of concrete actions to close this gap.

effort.description: Estimated effort to remediate this gap, in person-hours.
